label: 5220b Multifamily mortgage resolution program

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Mortgage Reform and Anti-Predatory Lending Act, and also as part of the Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act, and not as part of the Emergency Economic Stabilization Act of 2008 which comprises this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: the rental income generated by such properties; and

children.label: B
children.text: the preservation of adequate operating reserves;
maintaining the level of Federal, State, and city subsidies in effect as of ;July 21, 2010
facilitating the transfer of such properties, when appropriate and with the agreement of owners, to responsible new owners and ensuring affordability of such properties.

children.heading: Coordination
children.label: b Coordination
children.text: The Secretary of Housing and Urban Development may, in carrying out the program developed under this section, coordinate with the Secretary of the Treasury, the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation, the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, the Federal Housing Finance Agency, and any other Federal Government agency that the Secretary considers appropriate.

children.heading: Definition
children.label: c Definition
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “multifamily properties” means a residential structure that consists of 5 or more dwelling units.

children.heading: Prevention of qualification for criminal applicants
children.label: d Prevention of qualification for criminal applicants
A
children.text: Felony larceny, theft, fraud, or forgery.

children.heading: Procedures
children.label: 2 Procedures
children.text: The Secretary shall establish procedures to ensure compliance with this subsection.

children.heading: Report
children.label: 3 Report
children.text: The Secretary shall report to the Committee on Financial Services of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs of the Senate regarding the implementation of this provision. The report shall also describe the steps taken to implement this subsection.
